name: HR
description: Employee store: profiles, DBS, driving licence, right to work, contract metadata, document library, and portal requests.

declared_permissions.label: HR — full access (view, edit profiles, document requests, library)
HR — view employees, profiles, files, requests, reports (read-only)
HR — create employees and edit staff profiles
HR — create and approve/reject document requests
HR — upload or delete files in employee document libraries
HR — view per-employee activity log (admin + contractor portal actions)

changelog: Employee directory, document library, date of birth, richer admin dashboard. Public base: contractor theme toggle posts to sparrow_shared_contractor_ui (/contractor-ui/set-theme).
